DCT transmission failed to shift out of first gear, engine over rev light came on (white, yellow, RED - 7000 RPM!).  Got it off the road.  Car did it 3 times on the 50 mile trip.  Had it towed to dealer, Thomas Hyundai in Cumberland, Md.  They said they couldn't duplicate it, car

narrative.headline: What 2022 Hyundai Veloster owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 9 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Lane Departure (89% of reports).
